sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71425" key="nw/y" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νώψ</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νῶπος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> (<sense id="n71425.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">n</tr_>(<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ě</tr_>)-, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὄπτομαι</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purblind,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
